mapper.select: SELECT email, code, role, name, password_hash, store_id, expires_at, attempts FROM email_verification WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO email_verification (email, code, role, name, password_hash, store_id, expires_at, attempts) VALUES (#{email}, #{code}, #{role}, #{name}, #{passwordHash}, #{storeId}, #{expiresAt}, #{attempts})
mapper.update: UPDATE email_verification SET attempts = attempts + 1 WHERE email = #{email}
